title: Coords Sender
description: A lightweight client-side mod that enables private coordinate sharing with other players through an intuitive interface, With a friends list system and batch coordinate sending.
body:
**Coordinate Sender** is a client-side Fabric mod that streamlines the process of sharing your location with other players on multiplayer servers. Instead of typing coordinates manually in chat for everyone to see, this mod provides a clean interface to send your precise location privately to specific players or groups.

## Core Features

### 🎯 Player Selection Interface
- Browse all online players with their Minecraft heads displayed for easy identification
- Click any player to instantly send your current coordinates via private message
- Pagination support for servers with many players
- Real-time player list updates

### 👥 Friends List System
- Create and manage a persistent friends list
- Add/remove friends through an intuitive interface
- Send coordinates to all friends with a single keypress
- Quick access to your favorite players
- Friends list syncs across game sessions
- Player heads displayed for easy recognition

### 📨 Private Coordinate Sharing
- Customizable message command - choose between msg, tell, w, whisper, or set your own
- Works with any server's messaging system, including custom chat plugins
- Recipients receive coordinates in a clean, readable format
- No public chat spam - only you and the recipient see the shared location
- Automatic dimension detection (Overworld, Nether, End)
- Batch send to multiple friends simultaneously

### 📝 Enhanced Message History System
- Tracks all sent coordinates with timestamps
- Shows recipient information with player head icons
- Distinguishes between public and private messages
- Visual indicators showing up to 5 recipients per message
- Records the format used and dimension
- Configurable history size (default 50 entries)
- Quick history viewer with search and clear functions

### ⌨️ Customizable Controls
- **C Key**: Open player selection screen
- **Ctrl+V**: Quick send to public chat
- **H Key**: View coordinate history
- **X Key**: Open configuration menu
- **F Key**: Manage friends list
- **G Key**: Send coordinates to all friends
- All keybindings are customizable through Minecraft's controls menu

### ⚙️ Configuration Options
- Toggle sound effects on coordinate sending
- Enable/disable message history tracking
- **Choose messaging command** (msg, tell, w, whisper, or custom)
- Adjust maximum history entries
- Clear history with one click
- Settings persist between game sessions

## Technical Details

### Client-Side Only
- Works on any Minecraft server without requiring server-side installation
- Compatible with vanilla servers, Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, and other server types
- Supports custom chat plugins and non-standard messaging commands
- No additional setup required on multiplayer servers

*Note: This mod only works on multiplayer servers and requires other players to be online to share coordinates with them.*
